City Park Gaming and Brew Room


How to reach us

133 East Main Street, Westminster, Maryland, 21157

Parking: Main Entrance and Parking Lot located in the rear of the building off Winters St.
Free Parking in the Parking Lot

Phone: 443-201-9570

Email: popcultureantiques@gmail.com

Hours of Operation

Monday - Closed

Tuesday - 2:00pm to 7:00pm

Wednesday - 2:00pm to 10:00pm

Thursday - 2:00pm to 10:00pm

Friday - 12:00pm to 10:00pm

Saturday - 12:00pm to 10:00pm

Sunday - 12:00pm to 7:00pm

Policy

~No returns on used or opened merchandise

~All reward programs are subject to individual rules

~No cigars, cigarettes, tobacco, vapes, or drugs permitted inside

~Aggressive shoppers and players will be asked to leave and may be suspended

Located at 133 East Main Street, Westminster, Maryland, 21157, Suite 1.

Call Us at 443-201-9570 and follow or join us on Facebook, Instagram, or Discord for news on upcoming events or releases!
